name: meal
description: Meal by Hoagie — campus dining nutrition tracker for Princeton students.

ACCESS_TOKEN.description: Princeton OIT API OAuth access token.

CONSUMER_KEY.description: Princeton OIT API OAuth consumer key.

CONSUMER_SECRET.description: Princeton OIT API OAuth consumer secret.

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection URL. Automatically set by the Heroku Postgres add-on.

DEBUG.description: Set to 'true' for development mode, 'false' for production.

DJANGO_SECRET_KEY.description: Django secret key used for cryptographic signing.

PROJECT_PATH.description: Path to the Django project directory for the subdirectory buildpack.
